# CI Agile — Enterprise Agile Consulting Malaysia & Southeast Asia

> CI Agile delivers Jeff Sutherland Scrum training, SME team workshops, and enterprise agile transformation across Malaysia, Indonesia, and Southeast Asia.

## Primary Programs

- [JESS — Jeff Sutherland's Enterprise Scrum System](https://www.ciagile.com/jess/)
- [TeamWorks — 2-Day Team Training Workshops for SMEs](https://www.ciagile.com/teamworks/)

## Key Pages

- [JESS Leadership Certification Training](https://www.ciagile.com/jess/leadership-training.html)
- [JESS Class Schedule — Malaysia & SEA](https://www.ciagile.com/jess/class-schedule.html)
- [Creating Super Teams Workshop](https://www.ciagile.com/teamworks/creating-super-teams.html)
- [AI Skills for Your Team — Malaysia SME Workshop](https://www.ciagile.com/teamworks/ai-skills-for-your-team.html)
- [Design Thinking Workshop Malaysia](https://www.ciagile.com/teamworks/design-thinking.html)
- [Lean Problem Solving Workshop](https://www.ciagile.com/teamworks/practical-lean-problem-solving.html)
- [NOVA Series — Agile & Scrum 201](https://www.ciagile.com/jess/nova/agile-scrum.html)
- [NOVA Series — Design Thinking 201](https://www.ciagile.com/jess/nova/design-thinking.html)
